energytech.adverse-action-notice: CIP-008 1-hour wall-clock to E-ISAC + TSA SD 12-hour wall-clock to CISA+TSA (two parallel regulatory clocks, both as required drill records)
energytech.four-fifths-rule: POPULATION-LEVEL equity (not individual decisioning) — EPA Title VI EJ + Justice40 + state PUC EJ orders; 7-day freshness window for load shed (shortest in Suite)
energytech.protected-class-vault: bes_cyber_system_categorization + ot_it_boundary cross-bound across 3 repos + bcsi-protected-cip-011 + medical-baseline-tokenized-with-flag + 5 unique runtime invariants incl ot-it-data-diode-enforcement + critical-medical-equipment flag preservation
energytech.regulator-referral: NERC E-ISAC + CISA+TSA + DOE CESER + FERC + ISO/RTO Market Monitor + state PUC + EPA EJ + DOJ Civil Rights + NERC regional entity + AI vendor + energy-cyber insurer + FBI Cyber Division — 12 pathways (most extensive in Suite) with regulatory-clock meta-violations as first-class event types

defensetech.human-in-loop: us-person-verification-per-event-on-ITAR + secret-clearance-min-on-CLASSIFIED + ts-sci-clearance-on-SCI + FSO-cosign-on-CLASSIFIED+ — 4 enforcement-mode dimensions, axis-intersection at runtime
defensetech.adverse-action-notice: DFARS 252.204-7012(c)(1)(ii) 72-hour wall-clock report to dibnet.dod.mil (SECOND Suite vertical with numeric wall-clock invariant; FIRST was EnergyTech CIP-008 1-hour) + DDTC voluntary disclosure (optional, ITAR breach) + BIS voluntary disclosure (optional, EAR breach) + FSO notification (always, on cleared facility)
defensetech.four-fifths-rule: OFCCP 4/5ths-rule on DIB workforce dimensions + VEVRAA protected-veteran preference + Section 503 7%-utilization goal + EO 12968 + 32 CFR 147 adjudicative-guidelines disparity tracking + NISPOM insider-threat-flag-rate per-1000 + SBA SB/SDB/VOSB/SDVOSB flow-down coverage % — 15 dimensions × 8 metric kinds
defensetech.protected-class-vault: FIRST Suite vault contract with 3 orthogonal typed policy axes (cui_categorization 9 tiers × export_control_status 4 tiers × foreign_person_access_restriction 5 tiers) — resolvePolicy() intersects all 3 axes at runtime. cross_binding_refs as REQUIRED schema fields publish sibling repos (audit-stream + evidence-bundle + incident-card). vs LegalTech 1-axis, EnergyTech 2-axis, every other vertical 1-axis equivalent
defensetech.regulator-referral: DoD CIO (DFARS 7012 cyber incident via dibnet.dod.mil) + Cyber AB (CMMC ecosystem) + DIBCAC (DCMA government-led L3 assessment) + DDTC (ITAR voluntary disclosure) + BIS (EAR voluntary disclosure + Entity List screening) + NIST (standards-incorporation-by-reference) + GSA (FAR + Schedule + FedRAMP joint authorization) + DCMA (CPSR + supplier surveillance) + DCSA (NISPOM + personnel + facility clearance) + NARA-ISOO (CUI Registry + CUI Notice 2020-04) — 10 federal authorities × 8 distinct enforcement modes (most diverse state-tracker in Suite). 22 event types on Incident Card — LARGEST Incident Card profile in Suite

retailtech.human-in-loop: human_pricing_reviewer_required on bias-watchlist-band personalized-pricing events + human_review_required on every retail.biometric.face-template-matched + retail.refund.discrimination-claim. No federal ECOA-style adverse-action statute — driven by FTC §5 + state UDAP exposure.
retailtech.adverse-action-notice: EU Omnibus 2019/2161 Art 6a personalized-pricing disclosure modal (REQUIRED inline via pricing_transparency.disclosure_artifact_url) + CCPA/CPRA right-to-explanation on Automated Decisionmaking + per-state retail AI disclosure obligations (NY S365A ATBP, CA SB-892, CO ADMT). RetailTech-unique: no federal statutory equivalent to ECOA 1002.9 — non-disclosure is FTC §5 deceptive-practices exposure rather than a denied right.
retailtech.four-fifths-rule: FTC §5 disparate-impact framing under 2023 algorithmic-pricing guidance. 6 cohort dimensions (income-proxy ZIP-median + language-locale Accept-Language + device-class + time-of-day + geographic + loyalty-tenure) × 4-band verdict (within-tolerance 0.95-1.05× / watchlist / investigate / remediate). RetailTech-unique: time-of-day + loyalty-tenure proxy customer-acquisition cohorts where pricing can become discriminatory — dimensions a strict protected-class lens misses.
retailtech.protected-class-vault: 7 data classes × 4 tokenization methods × 6 retention envelopes. RetailTech-unique: biometric-special envelope (365-day BIPA-aligned hard-delete on T+366); location-data redacted-by-default with opt-in fine-geo as CCPA Sensitive PI; payment-data NEVER appears in audit-stream events (PCI DSS scope segregation); under-18 tokenization tier; data-broker-relationship disclosure obligation; CCPA Do-Not-Sell + Global Privacy Control honor.
retailtech.regulator-referral: 12 RetailTech event types (pricing-discrim, recommendation-bias-surface, fraud-false-positive-harm, biometric-misidentification, BIPA consent-violation, refund-discrimination, ad-personalization-harm, dark-patterns-enforcement, deceptive-AI-output, minor-targeting-violation, data-broker-exposure, loyalty-tier-discrim) × 8 reason codes × 4-band severity. Referral pathways: FTC §5 complaint, state AG inquiry, EU AI Act Art 73 serious-incident report. RetailTech-unique: BIPA per-scan-stacking remediation context post-IL SB 2979 (2024).

horizontal_tools.tagline: Routes any Suite artifact to the right vertical-specific verification across 11 verticals + dual-shape (spec + ref-impl)

reference_implementations.headline_invariant: HIPAA Safe-Harbor vault contract + hash-chained FHIR resource access events re-validated against spec JSON Schema in CI
FERPA basis enumeration (34 CFR Part 99) + COPPA verifiable parental consent must precede event timestamp for student_age < 13 (16 CFR §312.4)
UNIVERSAL human-underwriter rule (only Suite vertical with universal-not-scoped human gate) + ECOA Reg B 30-day adverse-action notice anchored on application_completed_at per 12 CFR §1002.9
Scoped human-adjudicator on adverse-action-capable + adverse recommendation + NAIC Model Bulletin on AI 90-day backward-bounded bias-monitoring window (must precede event)
NYC LL 144 14-day backward-before-event candidate-notice window + EEOC four-fifths-rule bias-audit timestamp bound
FCRA §604 permissible-purpose enumeration on credit-bureau resource pulls + ECOA timing-of-credit-decision binding
OMB M-24-10 impact-assessment completed before deployment precondition + rights-impacting vs safety-impacting disambiguation
Privilege-tier consistency + engagement-letter binding + citation-validation-before-production-ready (THREE simultaneous invariants — only Suite ref impl with that density)
NERC CIP-008 1-hour forward cyber-incident reporting wall clock (shortest in the Suite catalog)
DFARS 252.204-7012(c)(1)(ii) 72-hour forward cyber-incident clock + CUI 3-axis vault contract cross-binding (cui_categorization × export_control_status × foreign_person_access_restriction)
